name: Jilin OLED Material Tech Co., Ltd.
summary: Jilin OLED Material Tech Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, production, and sale of organic electroluminescent materials and equipment for the new display industry in China. It offers electronic functional materials; hole functional materials; light-emitting functional materials, such as fluorescent materials and phosphorescent materials; OLED intermediates; and other functional materials. The company also exports its products to Japan, South Korea, Europe, the United States, and other countries. Jilin OLED Material Tech Co., Ltd. was founded in 2005 and is based in Changchun, China.
